text.title: growth-tiktok-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-tiktok-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Slow hooks — no pattern interrupt in the first 1 second.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Viewers scroll past; watch time drops below algorithm threshold for distribution.

failure-mode.description: Corporate style content — polished, formal, product-feature-focused.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Does not fit TikTok's native casual style; algorithm detects low engagement and stops distributing.

failure-mode.description: Overproduced video with professional studio quality.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Feels inauthentic; native smartphone quality outperforms studio quality on this platform.

failure-mode.description: No CTA at the end of every video.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Viewers who finish without a follow prompt do not convert to followers or leads.
